findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "gpt55_balance_topup" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Top up a GPT55 prepaid balance account with x402 exact USDC before using balance-metered GPT-5.5 chat. Pay up to $0.005 per request with x402 USDC on Base or ch…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
